name: Keith Moon
title: Last known photo of Keith Moon, taken on September 6, 1978, at a party hosted by Paul McCartney — he died the following morning.
description: Keith Moon, the legendary drummer of the Who, was photographed on September 6, 1978, at a party hosted by Paul McCartney to celebrate the premiere of the film "The Buddy Holly Story". Moon attended with his girlfriend Annette Walter-Lax. They returned to their flat at 12 Curzon Place in Mayfair, London, where Moon took a large number of Heminevrin tablets — a sedative prescribed to help him combat alcohol withdrawal. He was found dead the next morning, having taken 32 tablets of the drug. He was 32 years old — coincidentally, one pill for each year of his life.
bio: Keith Moon was the drummer of the English rock band the Who. Known for his wild, energetic playing style and destructive antics, he is considered one of the greatest drummers in rock history.
